projects.question: Tell me about a data science project you've worked on.
What business problem was your project designed to solve?
What dataset did you use, and how did you obtain it?
What tools, programming languages, and libraries did you use, and why?
What was your biggest challenge during the project?
How did you clean and preprocess the data before analysis?
How did you determine whether your analysis or model successfully solved the business problem?
What insights did your project provide, and how could they influence business decisions?
If you rebuilt your project today, what changes would you make to improve the analysis, models, or business impact, and why?
Describe how you balanced technical accuracy, business objectives, interpretability, stakeholder requirements, and project deadlines.

Imagine that six months after deployment, business users report that your recommendations are no longer producing good results. Explain how you would investigate, validate the issue, and recommend improvements.
A company wants to expand your project to support millions of users across multiple regions. Describe how you would redesign the data pipeline, reporting, monitoring, and analytical workflows.
